title: Thank you for the incredible work!
author: Youssef
message: It was truly a fascinating year! I never would have thought this program would have such an impact on students' experiences. Not just the course itself, but the thoughtfully planned events too. Even with some trials and tribulations, you pulled off something incredible. To the mentors moving on: thank you for everything, and best of luck ahead. To those staying to guide the next first years: I have no doubt you'll keep this program going, just as you did for us! You may not see the impact you've made, but we will carry it with us for years to come.
